name: Lets Get Loot!
short_description: Dive into a fantasy idle/incremental game where hack-and-slash combat meets endless progression! Defeat enemies, collect epic loot, and level up to unlock new powers. Craft artifacts, conquer powerful bosses, and grow stronger! Forge your path to greatness in a world of endless adventure!
detailed_description:
In this game you will embark on an epic fantasy adventure in this idle/incremental hack-and-slash game! By epic, we mean get epic items! Cut through endless enemies, collect powerful loot, and level up your hero to face ever-greater challenges. With endless progression, dynamic combat, and artifact crafting, this game offers the perfect blend of action, strategy, and reward. Whether you're grinding for rare drops or letting the game work while you're away, the path to ultimate power is yours to forge!

You'll begin by deciding whether to play normal or to test fate by enduring a "Hardcore" run. Beware, if you fail in your adventures on Hardcore, all progress will be lost. Fortune goes to the bold. 

Next, you'll your hero's class. Each class has its quirks to help you along the way, and new classes can be unlocked as you progress through the game, or simply unlocked by finding it somehow within the game menus. 

As you begin battle, you'll be given the opportunity to choose the challenge rating of your foes, determining their power. Additionally, you can adjust their "spawn speed" to determine how often you face-off with them. Powerful potions are available to you to assist you, should you get into a pinch!

Your hero's power will be displayed to you using various indicators while the battle continues. These informational buttons can be used to learn how your hero can become the most powerful in the land. 

Collect powerful items to equip your hero. Some items may be imbued with an "Element", which will additionally gain power as you defeat foes. Create your favorite combination of items and elements to obtain ultimate glory!

Through your adventures, you will find Golden Skulls. Once enough of these Golden Skulls have been found, you may fuse them into your hero, providing additional power to equipped items and providing specialization points for your hero's use: 

As your adventures continue, you may seek adventure elsewhere! Visit other maps to fight more powerful foes and find treasure beyond your wildest desires!

Glory awaits! And remember, with active leaderboards each season, your friends are watching. Show them what you can do!

Enjoy LETS GET LOOT!
